nasb.text: then teach them the statutes and the laws, and make known to them the way in which they are to walk and the work they are to do.

esv.text: and you shall warn them about the statutes and the laws, and make them know the way in which they must walk and what they must do.

cnv.text: 又要把規例和律法教導他們，使他們知道他們當走的路，應作的事。

ccb.text: 又要教导他们律例和法度，指示他们当行的道、当做的事。
